text.title: Visibility of System Status Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: pay-now action without loading state → double-submission; corrected to spinner + disabled trigger.

example.title: Before
example.p: action=pay-now; duration_class=medium; loading_state=none; trigger_disabled=false; users click multiple times → duplicate charges. severity=1.

example.title: After
example.p: action=pay-now; duration_class=medium; loading_state=spinner; trigger_disabled=true; success_state=true; error_state.present=true + auto_dismiss=false; aria_live=polite. severity=0. fix_direction: "OK".

section.title: Example: error toast for declined card

example.title: Before
example.p: error_state.present=true + auto_dismiss=true (3s). Users miss the message. severity=1.

example.title: After
example.p: error_state.present=true + auto_dismiss=false. Manual close required; aria_live=assertive (critical). severity=0.
